name: KIYA MANIMI

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

abilities.name: Technophile
abilities.text: Once per activation. After a model empowers a duel within 6" of this model, this model gains a Voyage token.

actions.name: Charged Spear
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a friendly token from itself. If a token was removed, damage from this attack is irreducible.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then, the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Discus Grenade
actions.effects: Enemy models within (x)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then, the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Amped Up
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Discard a card or remove a friendly token from this model.
actions.effects: This model heals 2 and enemy models within (x)2" are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Overclocked Reflex
triggers.text: An ally within 2" of this model gains a Fast token.

extraction_notes: The shield icon in the Armor ability text is rendered as (unusual_defense) based on defensive_type context
The shield icon in the Ruthless ability text refers to defensive abilities generally
